title: Designing for Real People: User Personas

questions.sentence: A common mistake in web development is building a website for yourself instead of the actual users
To avoid this designers create User Persona's
A persona is a fictional character that represents a specific type of user who will use your product
It includes details like their age job goals and technical skills
By referring to these personas developers and designers can make better decisions about layout features and content
Persona's help the team stay empathetic and focused on solving real problems for real people
